Our Story

Two lives, two worlds — drawn together by something greater than chance.

A family of four · Mist & mountains
She  ·  Naveena A.S

A beautiful, innocent and calm young woman from the misty hills of Wayanad — a future teacher with a dancer's soul. She lives with her parents and younger brother, quietly wondering about the one she hasn't yet met.

A family of five · Natively from Trivandrum
He  ·  Divendu Kannan

A handsome, mature and calm Software Engineer living in London — natively from Trivandrum. He loves to travel, work with data, and drive cars and bikes. A close family of five back home — his whole world, waiting to grow.

Wayanad ↔ Trivandrum
The Families

With all the love in their hearts, both families created profiles — hoping to find the right one for their child. They found each other. The children agreed to a call.

The call that changed everything
Connected

A video call — London to Wayanad. Twenty minutes of nerves, laughter and unexpected ease. When it ended, they both knew. "Let's proceed."

London Heathrow → Cochin International
The Journey Begins

Divendu boards a flight from London. Across time zones, over oceans — heading home to Kerala. This time, not just for family. For something more.

Dawn drive through the Western Ghats
The Drive

He drives through the misty Western Ghats at dawn — winding roads, tea gardens, the scent of rain on earth. Trivandrum to Wayanad. The mountains welcome him.

Two homes, one warmth
The Families Meet

The families visited each other. Two homes, two families — and they loved what they found. A warmth that felt like it had always been there.

He came. She was there.
The First Meeting

He came to meet her in Wayanad. She was there. No more wondering — just a quiet certainty, warm and sure, settling gently between them.

Dass Continental · Thrissur · Kerala
Engaged  ·  12 September 2026

And so it was decided — at Dass Continental, Thrissur. Two hearts, one beginning. The rest is the story they will write together.

ananyāścintayanto māṁ
ye janāḥ paryupāsate
teṣāṁ nityābhiyuktānāṁ
yoga-kṣemaṁ vahāmy aham

Bhagavad Gītā · 9.22

"To those who love with an undivided heart,
who think of nothing else —
I carry what they need and preserve
what they already have."

— Śrī Kṛṣṇa to Arjuna
